ingredients.name: Nisshindo Wagashi Store
ingredients.address: 37 Iwafunemachi Shizuka, Tochigi, 329-4307, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: In Chapter 1, young Akari waits near Iwafune town while Takaki's trains are delayed by snow, and this traditional confectionery shop sits in the same Tochigi neighborhood Akari called home, grounding the film's first ache of separation in a real small-town streetscape.

ingredients.name: Near the Tanegashimashinsei Christ Church

ingredients.entityContext: This area near the Christ Church on Tanegashima island appears as part of the rural backdrop Kanae cycles through in Chapter 2, capturing the quiet, sun-bleached island life she inhabits while watching rockets and nursing feelings she cannot tell Takaki.

ingredients.entityContext: The Nakayama coast on Tanegashima is where Kanae surfs and stands watching the horizon in Chapter 2, the wide open sea and sky mirroring her unspoken longing for Takaki and her own uncertain future.
